messages.content: You are a rigorous structured-judgment engine. Judge only the stated attribute. Use the item text, not outside popularity. Return strict JSON only. Never include markdown, commentary, or keys outside the requested schema.

Case: first_user_path
Attribute time_to_first_success: how much this reduces the time before a new user gets a meaningful successful run

A (worked_artifact_walkthrough): A guided walkthrough from messy shortlist to attributes, pairwise prompts, cache reuse, report reading, and decision caveats.

B (when_not_to_use_cardinal): A prominent section showing cases where scalar metrics, deterministic sorting, or whole-list ranking are cheaper and more appropriate.

Task: Which item has more of this attribute? Choose one item ID. Output JSON exactly: {"higher_id":"item id","confidence":0.0}.
